Petition To Terminate Estate
Off Calendar Nov-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

The Court advised Mr. Ferdon that instead of terminating the Estate it will order it distributed so that the Heirs can pursue a judgment. The Petition to Terminate Estate was taken under submission for review and modification of the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Proof Of Posting Of Bond Or Filing Of Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Irina Aerov for Dymitr Gribanowski. Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

The Court noted that service of the Order to Show Cause Re Contempt on Vladimir Privalov was unsuccessful, proposed suspending Mr. Privalov's powers immediately and asked that the Public Administrator prepare a petition for final distribution based solely on the information that is in the file. The Court also stated that Mr. Privalov will be denied statutory fees, that the Public Administrator will receive fees and can have a lien on any property, and that the Heirs may pursue a judgment if they wish. The Court will issue an order removing Mr. Privalov. Mr. Ferdon will prepare an order appointing the Public Administrator, issue letters and do an inventory. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution was set for May 28, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. All other matters (posting of bond/receipt for blocked account; order to appear; status of accounting; order to show cause) were taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Proof Of Posting Of Bond Or Filing Of Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Jan-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Irina Aerov for Dmitri Gribanowski.

The Court noted that Mr. Privalov was not present. Mr. Ferdon stated that the Public Administrator is not accepting appointment. Ms. Aerov explained that her Client is unable to serve. An Order to Show Cause Re Contempt will be issued to Vladimir Privalov to appear on January 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he has failed to place funds in a blocked account. If no appearance is made by Mr. Privalov on that the date, sanctions may be imposed and a bench warrant may be issued. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

The Order to Show Cause and the status hearings are continued to January 22, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to be heard by Judge Wiss. The Order to Show Cause will reflect the January 22, 2014 hearing date.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Jan-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Continued To Jan-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Continued To Dec-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Proof Of Posting Of Bond Or Filing Of Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Continued To Dec-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Irina Aerov for Dymitr Gribanowski. Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Vladimir Pivalov (Executor) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Privalov stated that the funds have not been placed into a blocked account, that the Court does not have a clear picture of how the money should be distributed, that the money was his, that the money is gone, that he paid his debt and that he should have taken his money five years ago when the house was sold. The Court admonished Mr. Privalov and explained that he had no authority to take Estate funds. Mr. Ferdon spoke of possible form of punishment for Mr. Privalov's actions. Ms. Aerov stated that she was not sure how her Client would want to proceed. The Court ordered Mr. Privalov to file his accounting three days before December 4, 2013 in the form of a petition and for Mr. Privalov to be present on that day. Proof of posting of bond or filing of receipt for blocked account, and the order to appear were continued to December 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to see if a petition for appointment of a Successor Administrator is filed. The October 29, 2013 status hearing is also continued to December 4, 2013.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Continued To Dec-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Proof Of Posting Of Bond Or Filing Of Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Continued To Oct-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Irina Aerov for Dimitri Gribanowski.

No appearance was made by Vladimir Privolov. Ms. Aerov stated that Mr. Privalov has the funds not her Client, that there has been no contact from Mr. Privolov, and that she had an abstract of judgment and writ of execution issued. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Vladimir Privalov to appear on October 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the funds are not placed in a blocked account or why bond has not been issued, and why a petition for final distribution has not been filed. Vladimir Privalov's powers as Executor of the Estate are suspended. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jul-20-2011 Continued To Sep-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher Kerosky for Dmitri Gribanowski. Vladimir Privalov in Prporia Persona.

Mr. Kerosky stated that he will dismiss the civil case if they can get the 850 petition resolved. Mr. Privalov stated that he believes that the probate court is not proper venue, that he prefers to keep the matter in the civil action and that he is unable to obatain Counsel. The Court stated that the probate action will be stayed pending the civil action. The probate matter was continued to September 21, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for trial setting and for status of the civil action.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Cross Defendant Gribanowskis Demurrer And Motion To Strike To Cross Complainants Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher Kersoky made a special appearance for and with Dimitri Gribanowski and for and with Anna Rayak. Vladimir Privalov in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that there appears to be an identical civil action and identical cross complaint in case number CGC-10-506424. The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions. Anna Rayak's demurrer to the cross complaint is sustatined without leave to amend. The Court does not see any basis upon which this action could be brought against Ms. Rayak. With regard to Dimitiri Gribanowski's demurrer: The First, Second and Third causes of actions are sustained without leave to amend. The Fourth and Fifth causes of actions are sustained with leave to amend. The amendment is to be filed by July 20, 2011. The hearing date on the 850 petition on calendar for July 6, 2011 was continued to July 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. All Parties agreed to the continuance.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
